rationale: In the citing paper, Bruce, Desai, and Staelin (2005) appears only in a grouped literature-list citation (footnote 11) as part of broad prior work on channel coordination and inefficiencies. The paper does not single out this study's specific theory, results, measures, or empirical setting for its own model development or interpretation. Since the citation serves general background positioning without a distinct role for this specific source, it is a mention-only citation.
